headline: Machine Learning Engineer
skills_text: Python, scikit-learn, PyTorch, FastAPI, Airflow, Docker, Feature Engineering, Model Monitoring
resume_text: Machine Learning Engineer with 5 years building forecasting and classification services. Converted notebooks into FastAPI services, engineered features, automated retraining with Airflow, and monitored production model quality.

headline: MLOps Engineer
skills_text: Kubeflow, MLflow, Prometheus, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Python, Airflow
resume_text: MLOps Engineer with 6 years operating production ML platforms. Built deployment workflows with Docker and Kubernetes, handled model registry with MLflow, and monitored drift and latency using Prometheus.

headline: AI Research Engineer
skills_text: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, CUDA, Jupyter, NumPy, Experimentation
resume_text: AI Research Engineer with 7 years of deep learning experimentation. Benchmarked model architectures in PyTorch and TensorFlow, reviewed literature, and collaborated on prototype-to-product transitions.

headline: Software Engineer (Backend)
skills_text: Python, Java, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Docker, CI/CD, Unit Testing
resume_text: Backend Software Engineer with 5 years developing REST APIs and internal services. Built Python and Java services, optimized PostgreSQL queries, and maintained CI/CD. Limited direct model development experience.

headline: Cloud Engineer
skills_text: AWS, Azure, Terraform, Docker, Kubernetes, Linux, Python, IAM
resume_text: Cloud Engineer with 6 years of infrastructure and migration work across AWS and Azure. Built Terraform modules, improved IAM controls, and automated operations with Python.

headline: NLP Engineer
skills_text: Python, Transformers, spaCy, FastAPI, Docker, PyTorch, Text Classification
resume_text: NLP Engineer with 4 years building text classification and extraction pipelines. Deployed inference APIs with FastAPI and Docker and fine-tuned transformer models in PyTorch.

headline: Junior Data Scientist
skills_text: Python, SQL, pandas, scikit-learn, Tableau, Statistics
resume_text: Junior Data Scientist with 2 years of internship and entry-level analytics work. Built baseline scikit-learn models, prepared datasets in pandas and SQL, and supported dashboard reporting.

headline: Data Engineer
skills_text: SQL, Spark, Kafka, AWS, Airflow, Data Modeling, ETL
resume_text: Data Engineer with 8 years building ingestion pipelines and warehouse models. Worked with Spark and Kafka on AWS, improved data quality checks, and maintained Airflow orchestration.

headline: Product Data Analyst
skills_text: SQL, Tableau, Mixpanel, Amplitude, Excel, Python
resume_text: Product Data Analyst with 4 years of funnel analysis and retention reporting. Built product dashboards in Tableau and used SQL with Mixpanel and Amplitude to support roadmap decisions.

headline: Backend Developer (Node.js)
skills_text: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Docker, REST APIs
resume_text: Backend Developer with 3 years building service APIs in Node.js and Express. Focused on MongoDB applications and internal tooling, with minimal ML or analytics responsibilities.
